cognito.identitypool.pushsync.CfnAbout: `PushSync` is a property of the [AWS::Cognito::IdentityPool](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AWSCloudFormation/latest/UserGuide/aws-resource-cognito-identitypool.html) resource that defines the configuration options to be applied to an Amazon Cognito identity pool.

cognito.identitypool.pushsync.Applicatio.Description: The ARNs of the Amazon SNS platform applications that could be used by clients.

cognito.identitypool.pushsync.RoleArn.Description: An IAM role configured to allow Amazon Cognito to call Amazon SNS on behalf of the developer.
